title: The Bald Bandit
desc: A bank robber strikes — and a kid's video camera catches his bald head on tape. 🎃

q.en: Who is the man who calls himself 'Detective Reddy' and asks the kids to find the video?
q.zh: 那个自称“雷迪侦探”、让孩子们去找录像带的人到底是谁？

explain.en: He was actually the bank robber, pretending to be a detective so he could find and destroy the video that showed his face.
explain.zh: 他其实是银行劫匪，假扮成侦探，想找到并销毁那盘拍到他脸的录像带。

q.en: What did Ruth Rose dress up as for Halloween?
q.zh: 万圣节时露丝·罗丝扮成了什么？

explain.en: Ruth Rose wore a shiny black wig, fake eyebrows, a white sequin suit, and carried a little guitar to look like Elvis.
explain.zh: 露丝戴了亮黑假发、假眉毛，穿白色亮片西装，还拿着一把小吉他，扮成了猫王。

q.en: Why did the redheaded teenager shave his head at Howard's barbershop?
q.zh: 那个红发少年为什么去理发店把头剃光了？

options.en: So the robber wouldn't recognize him

explain.en: The robber looked right at him when running out of the bank, so he shaved his head to avoid being recognized.
explain.zh: 劫匪跑出银行时正好盯着他看，所以他剃光头以免被认出来。

q.en: What is the real name of the redheaded kid who filmed the robber?
q.zh: 拍下劫匪的那个红发少年叫什么？

explain.en: His nickname was Lucky, but his real name was Paul O'Leary, and he lived on Robin Road with his big redheaded family.
explain.zh: 他的外号叫“拉基”，真名是保罗·奥利里，和一大群红发家人住在知更鸟路。

q.en: What did the kids notice on the video that helped them identify the fake detective?
q.zh: 孩子们从录像里发现了什么，从而认出了假侦探？

options.en: The robber was bald and looked just like Detective Reddy
options.zh: 劫匪是光头，长得和雷迪侦探一模一样

options.en: The robber was wearing a clown suit

explain.en: The tape showed a completely bald man with a dimple on his chin; Ruth Rose put her wig and eyebrow on the screen and he looked exactly like Detective Reddy.
explain.zh: 录像里是一个光头、下巴有酒窝的男人；露丝把假发和假眉毛贴在屏幕上，发现他和雷迪侦探一模一样。

q.en: Where did Josh hide the real video when the fake detective arrived?
q.zh: 假侦探上门时，乔什把真正的录像带藏在了哪里？

options.en: In Loretta the guinea pig's cage
options.zh: 藏在豚鼠洛蕾塔的笼子里

explain.en: Josh slipped the tape into Loretta's cage and covered it with shavings so the fake detective wouldn't find it.
explain.zh: 乔什把录像带塞进洛蕾塔的笼子，用木屑盖住，假侦探就找不到了。

q.en: How did Ruth Rose help catch the robber?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝是如何帮忙抓住劫匪的？

options.en: She sneaked out and called the police
She hid the video at home

explain.en: Ruth Rose slipped out, went to her house, and called Officer Fallon and Officer Keene, who came and arrested the man.
explain.zh: 露丝偷偷溜出去，跑回家给法伦警官和基恩警官打了电话，两位警察赶来逮捕了劫匪。

q.en: What was the total reward the bank gave for the video?
q.zh: 银行为这盘录像带总共发了多少奖金？

explain.en: The bank's real reward was $5,000; the kids had only been promised $100 each by the fake detective.
explain.zh: 银行给的真实奖金是5000美元，而假侦探当时只答应给每个孩子100美元。

q.en: After giving Lucky his half, how much did each of the three kids get?
q.zh: 分给拉基一半之后，三个孩子每人拿到多少钱？

explain.en: They gave Lucky $2,500 (half of $5,000), leaving $2,500 to split three ways — about $833.33 each.
explain.zh: 他们给了拉基2500美元（5000的一半），剩下2500美元三人平分，每人约833.33美元。

q.en: What was the fake detective really trying to get from the kids?
q.zh: 那个假侦探真正想从孩子们手里得到什么？

options.en: The video, so he could destroy the proof of his crime
options.zh: 那盘录像带，好销毁自己犯罪的证据

explain.en: He was the robber; if he got the tape, no one could prove he was in the bank, so he'd go free.
explain.zh: 他就是劫匪——只要拿到录像带，就没人能证明他进过银行，他就可以逍遥法外。
